title: Chunk claim Mod
description: The Chunk Claim Mod is a land protection system that allows players to claim chunks and prevent unauthorized access.
body:
# 📦 Chunk Claim

A serverside NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that allows players to claim and protect chunks. Admins can define spawn areas where certain actions are globally disabled.

## ✨ Features

- 🏠 Claim chunks and protect them from other players
- 💎 Purchase additional claim slots using diamonds, or have an admin grant them
- 🤝 Trust other players to allow them to build in your claims
- 🛡️ Spawn Claims: global protection zones (no PvP, no block breaking, no fire, etc.)
- 🖥️ Clean GUIs for claim info, settings, and statistics
- 🔑 OP bypass mode for admins

## 🧾 Commands

### 👤 Player Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/claim` | Claims the chunk you are currently standing in. |
| `/claim buy [amount]` | Buys additional claim slots using diamonds. |
| `/claim number` | Shows your available claim slots. |
| `/unclaim` | Removes your claim from the current chunk. |
| `/claimlist` | Lists all of your claims. |
| `/claiminfo` | Shows information about the current chunk. |
| `/trust <player>` | Allows a player to build in all of your claims. |
| `/untrust <player>` | Removes a player's trust. |
| `/trustlist` | Shows all players you have trusted. |
| `/statistics` | Opens the claim statistics GUI. |
| `/settings` | Opens the settings GUI. |
| `/commands`
```
 
```
| Displays the full command overview. |

### 🔧 Admin Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/spawnclaim` | Marks the current chunk as a spawn claim. |
| `/spawnclaim remove` | Removes the spawn claim from the current chunk. |
| `/spawnclaim list` | Lists all spawn claims. |
| `/slots give <player> <amount>` | Grants claim slots to a player. |
| `/slots remove <player> <amount>` | Removes claim slots from a player. |
| `/prices [amount]` | Shows or sets the price per claim slot (in diamonds). |
| `/adminunclaim [x z \| here \| player <player> \| claim <player> <nr>]` | Removes claims as an admin. |
| `/adminclaims <player>` | Lists all claims of a specific player. |
| `/claimopbypass <on\|off>` | Toggles OP bypass for claim protection. |

## 🛠️ Requirements

| | |
|--|--|
| **Minecraft** | 1.21.1 |
| **Mod Loader** | NeoForge 21.1.211+ |
| **Side** | Server & Client |

Make sure report Bugs on Discord: https://discord.gg/UurtMpN39x
